calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Petitioners: Abdon M. Danting, Jr. and Analie Baluyut Danting, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Khelsy Ann M. Baluyut and Abdon Frances Baluyut, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Khelsy Ann Baluyut Danting and Abdon Frances Baluyut Danting.
Decree signed in open court.
